channel.title: Graduate Research Methods in Psychology on Psych 711: Graduate Research Methods in Psychology. Spring, 2026
channel.description: Recent content in Graduate Research Methods in Psychology on Psych 711: Graduate Research Methods in Psychology. Spring, 2026

item.title: Logistics
item.description: Course: Psych 711: Graduate Research Methods in Psychology Instructors: Profs. Gary Lupyan & João Guassi Moreira. Lecture Time: Wednesdays 2:30pm-3:45pm, Brogden 634 Section Time: Mondays, 3:00pm-3:50pm, Brogden 634 Office hours for Gary: Wednesday 4pm-5pm, Brogden 526 Office hours for João: Monday 10am-11am, Brogden 517 Syllabus: Class syllabus Where to access the readings The readings are available here. If there are any changes to the syllabus, the Google Drive folder will be automatically updated.

item.title: Resources
item.description: The site was built with Blogdown/Hugo/Netlify and some ChatGPT magic. Blogdown: https://bookdown.org/yihui/blogdown/ Hugo: https://gohugo.io/ Netlify: https://docs.netlify.com/ Github repo for this page The image on the front page is Max Ernst’s The Gramineous Bicycle Garnished with Bells the Dappled Fire Damps and the Echinoderms Bending the Spine to Look for Caresses (La Biciclette graminée garnie de grelots les grisons grivelés et les échinodermes courbants l’échine pour quêter des caresses)
